caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a dark green t-shirt is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or shop. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. The background includes a white male mannequin dressed in a white shirt, various framed photographs on the wall, and racks of clothing. Small logos are visible in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that says "SIT DOWN" and another that reads "REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his head and shifting his facial expressions as he speaks, while the camera angle and background remain static.
